'''âw-y-sh''' ('''kawayash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unattire|unattire]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unattire|unattire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-y-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kawayash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwayash|thiwayash]] || [[word:jiwayash|jiwayash]] || [[word:shiwayash|shiwayash]] || [[word:kiwayash|kiwayash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwayash|thuthuwayash]] || [[word:jujuwayash|jujuwayash]] || [[word:shushuwayash|shushuwayash]] || [[word:kukuwayash|kukuwayash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwayash|thuwayash]] || [[word:juwayash|juwayash]] || [[word:shuwayash|shuwayash]] || [[word:kuwayash|kuwayash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwayash|thuwayash]] || [[word:juwayash|juwayash]] || [[word:shuwayash|shuwayash]] || [[word:kuwayash|kuwayash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewayash|thewayash]] || [[word:jewayash|jewayash]] || [[word:shewayash|shewayash]] || [[word:kewayash|kewayash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowayash|thothowayash]] || [[word:jojowayash|jojowayash]] || [[word:shoshowayash|shoshowayash]] || [[word:kokowayash|kokowayash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowayash|thowayash]] || [[word:jowayash|jowayash]] || [[word:showayash|showayash]] || [[word:kowayash|kowayash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowayash|thowayash]] || [[word:jowayash|jowayash]] || [[word:showayash|showayash]] || [[word:kowayash|kowayash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwayash|thĂŠwayash]] || [[word:jĂŠwayash|jĂŠwayash]] || [[word:shĂŠwayash|shĂŠwayash]] || [[word:kĂŠwayash|kĂŠwayash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawayash|thathawayash]] || [[word:jajawayash|jajawayash]] || [[word:shashawayash|shashawayash]] || [[word:kakawayash|kakawayash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawayash|thawayash]] || [[word:jawayash|jawayash]] || [[word:shawayash|shawayash]] || [[word:kawayash|kawayash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawayash|thawayash]] || [[word:jawayash|jawayash]] || [[word:shawayash|shawayash]] || [[word:kawayash|kawayash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawayash|shawayash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawayash|goshawayash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawayash|gokishawayash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawayashnĂŒ|shawayashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawayashnknĂŒ|goshawayashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayashnĂŒ|gokishawayashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawayashĂ«|shawayashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawayashnkshĂ«|goshawayashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawayashĂ«|gokishawayashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayashro|shawayashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayashnkro|goshawayashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayashro|gokishawayashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayashmu|shawayashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayashnkmu|goshawayashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayashmu|gokishawayashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawayasher|shawayasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawayashnksher|goshawayashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawayasher|gokishawayasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawayashng|shawayashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawayashnkng|goshawayashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawayashng|gokishawayashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawayashya|shawayashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawayashnkya|goshawayashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawayashya|gokishawayashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawayashyam|shawayashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawayashnkyam|goshawayashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawayashyam|gokishawayashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawayashnĂŒshĂ«|shawayashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawayashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawayashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawayashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawayashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayashnĂŒro|shawayashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayashnknĂŒro|goshawayashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayashnĂŒro|gokishawayashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayashnĂŒmu|shawayashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayashnknĂŒmu|goshawayashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayashnĂŒmu|gokishawayashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawayashĂ«nĂŒ|shawayashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawayashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawayashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawayashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayashĂ«ro|shawayashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayashnkshĂ«ro|goshawayashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayashĂ«ro|gokishawayashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayashĂ«mu|shawayashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayashnkshĂ«mu|goshawayashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayashĂ«mu|gokishawayashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawayashronĂŒ|shawayashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawayashnkronĂŒ|goshawayashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayashronĂŒ|gokishawayashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawayashroshĂ«|shawayashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawayashnkroshĂ«|goshawayashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawayashroshĂ«|gokishawayashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayashromu|shawayashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayashnkromu|goshawayashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayashromu|gokishawayashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawayashmunĂŒ|shawayashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawayashnkmunĂŒ|goshawayashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayashmunĂŒ|gokishawayashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawayashmushĂ«|shawayashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawayashnkmushĂ«|goshawayashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawayashmushĂ«|gokishawayashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayashmuro|shawayashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayashnkmuro|goshawayashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayashmuro|gokishawayashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
